steps.title: Identify the historical standard
steps.content: The passage directly states: “Highly decorated and detailed sets were not common until the 1600s.” This establishes that simple stages were the standard theatrical experience in the distant past.

steps.title: Match to audience expectations
steps.content: If simple stages were standard in that era, audiences would expect them—what audiences experience regularly becomes their norm. “Expected by” is correct. The other three choices describe reactions that imply audiences experienced simple stages as unusual or problematic, contradicting that standard. That matches choice A — A is correct.
